query: We need to rename plan_tier to billing_tier across the codebase. It's persisted, in two services, and the dashboard.
make the user auth middleware more elegant
ok i need to delete the /v1/users legacy endpoint, ive been telling people to migrate for 6 months
refactor the payment processor to extract retry logic into a strategy class but keep all the tests passing
migrate the users.email field to lowercase across the entire prod database, we have like 2M rows
boss wants us to switch the billing webhook from stripe to a homegrown service before EOQ, this affects revenue reporting and the customer-facing receipt emails
fix the typo in README where it says 'recieve' instead of 'receive'
what does the difference between map and flatMap look like in this codebase, can you point me to a few uses?
format this JSON file properly with 2-space indents
explain how the authentication flow works in src/auth/middleware.ts, im trying to understand the cookie handling
what's the diff between v0.6.1 and v0.6.2 of socrates-protocol
add a comment above the readUser function explaining why we cache the result
